# bp.bp_smooth_track { #tspaint.bp.bp_smooth_track }

```python
tspaint.bp.bp_smooth_track(track, pi, epsilon)
```

Smooth one tip's :class:`~tspaint.output.Segment` track along the genome.

Intervals and status are preserved; posteriors are replaced by the
horizontally-smoothed ones.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**track**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[list](`list`)\[[Segment](`tspaint.output.Segment`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   One tip's piecewise-constant painting.

<code>[**pi**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [([array_like](`array_like`), [shape](`shape`)([K](`K`)))]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per-tree prior (see :func:`bp_smooth`).

<code>[**epsilon**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per-breakpoint switch probability (see :func:`bp_smooth`).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[list](`list`)\[[Segment](`tspaint.output.Segment`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The track with smoothed posteriors (a copy of ``track`` if it has < 2 segments).
